task.goal: Swing the two-link acrobot so the free end reaches the target height.
task.success_condition: A successful episode reaches the target height well before the 500 step time limit.
task.reward_description: The environment gives -1 reward per step until the goal is reached. Higher total return is better.
notes: This is a telemetry task: the policy and the human task description both use the same public sensor readings.
The observation exposes joint angle components and angular velocities as public instrument readings, not hidden evaluator state.

minimum_score.reason: Policy errors, invalid actions, evaluator failures, and workspace contract violations receive the worst 500-step score.

observation_meanings.name: cos_theta_1
observation_meanings.meaning: Cosine of the first joint angle.

observation_meanings.name: sin_theta_1
observation_meanings.meaning: Sine of the first joint angle.

observation_meanings.name: cos_theta_2
observation_meanings.meaning: Cosine of the second joint angle.

observation_meanings.name: sin_theta_2
observation_meanings.meaning: Sine of the second joint angle.

observation_meanings.name: theta_dot_1
observation_meanings.meaning: Angular velocity of the first joint.

observation_meanings.name: theta_dot_2
observation_meanings.meaning: Angular velocity of the second joint.

action_meanings.name: negative_torque
action_meanings.meaning: Apply negative torque to the actuated joint.

action_meanings.name: positive_torque
action_meanings.meaning: Apply positive torque to the actuated joint.
